title: Financial Times
author: Financial Times Ltd.
description: Leading international financial and business newspaper providing news, analysis, and insight on global markets, companies, and economic developments.

title: Wall Street Journal
author: Dow Jones & Company
description: American business-focused, international daily newspaper based in New York City, known for comprehensive coverage of financial markets and business news.

title: Bloomberg Businessweek
author: Bloomberg L.P.
description: American weekly business magazine providing analysis on the global economy, companies, industries, finance, technology, and government policy.

title: The Economist
author: The Economist Group
description: British weekly newspaper focusing on current affairs, international business, politics, technology, and culture, with particular emphasis on economic analysis.

title: Barron's
author: Dow Jones & Company
description: American weekly magazine focusing on financial information, analysis, and commentary, with emphasis on stock market trends and investment strategies.

title: Forbes
author: Forbes Media
description: American business magazine focusing on business, investing, technology, entrepreneurship, leadership, and lifestyle topics.

title: Fortune
author: Fortune Media Group Holdings
description: American multinational business magazine focusing on business, finance, investing, technology, and corporate leadership.

title: Money Magazine
author: Dotdash Meredith
description: American brand and magazine that covers personal finance, investing, saving, and money management advice for consumers.

title: Kiplinger's Personal Finance
author: The Kiplinger Washington Editors
description: American personal finance magazine providing practical advice on investing, spending, saving, and retirement planning.

title: 财新周刊
author: 财新传媒
description: 中国领先的财经媒体，提供深度的财经新闻、分析和评论，专注于经济、金融、政策和商业报道。

title: 第一财经
author: 上海第一财经传媒
description: 中国知名财经媒体，提供股市、基金、期货、外汇、债券等金融市场的专业资讯和深度分析。

title: 经济观察报
author: 经济观察报社
description: 中国具有影响力的财经类周报，专注于经济、商业、社会发展等领域的深度报道和分析。

title: 21世纪经济报道
author: 南方报业传媒集团
description: 中国权威的财经类日报，提供国内外经济、金融、投资、产业等方面的专业报道和分析。

title: 证券时报
author: 证券时报社
description: 中国证券市场的权威报纸，专注于股票、债券、基金等证券市场的新闻报道和深度分析。

title: 中国证券报
author: 中国证券报社
description: 中国证券业界的权威报纸，由新华通讯社主管，专注于证券、基金、期货等金融市场报道。

title: CoinDesk
author: CoinDesk, Inc.
description: Leading news site specializing in bitcoin and digital currencies, providing comprehensive coverage of cryptocurrency markets, blockchain technology, and regulatory developments.

title: The Block
author: The Block Inc.
description: Institutional-grade research and news platform focused on cryptocurrency, blockchain, and digital assets, providing data-driven analysis for professionals.

title: Decrypt
author: Decrypt Media Inc.
description: Independent media company covering cryptocurrency, blockchain, and the future of money, making complex topics accessible to a broad audience.

title: Cointelegraph
author: Cointelegraph Media Group
description: Independent publication covering cryptocurrency, blockchain technology, DeFi, and digital finance news with global perspective.

title: 金色财经
author: 金色财经
description: 中国领先的区块链媒体平台，提供加密货币、区块链技术、DeFi等数字资产领域的新闻和分析。

title: 链闻
author: 链闻
description: 专注于区块链技术和加密资产的中文媒体，提供深度分析、行业动态和投资见解。

title: 律动BlockBeats
author: 律动
description: 区块链媒体平台，专注于加密货币市场动态、区块链技术发展和数字资产投资分析。

title: PANews
author: PANews
description: 专业的区块链媒体平台，提供加密货币行情、区块链项目分析和行业深度报道。

title: 吴说区块链
author: 吴说区块链
description: 知名区块链媒体和分析师平台，提供加密货币市场分析、区块链项目评估和行业观察。

title: Journal of Finance
author: American Finance Association
description: Premier academic journal in finance, publishing high-quality research in corporate finance, asset pricing, financial markets, and related areas.

title: Journal of Financial Economics
author: Elsevier
description: Leading academic journal publishing theoretical and empirical research in financial economics, covering corporate finance, investments, and financial markets.

title: Review of Financial Studies
author: Oxford Academic
description: Top-tier academic journal publishing research on all aspects of financial economics, including corporate finance, asset pricing, and financial institutions.

title: Journal of Monetary Economics
author: Elsevier
description: Academic journal focusing on monetary theory and policy, central banking, international finance, and macroeconomic aspects of financial markets.

title: American Economic Review
author: American Economic Association
description: Premier economics journal publishing research across all areas of economics, including finance, with rigorous peer review and high impact.

title: Quarterly Journal of Economics
author: Oxford Academic
description: Oldest professional journal of economics in the English language, publishing influential research in theoretical and empirical economics including finance.

title: Journal of Political Economy
author: University of Chicago Press
description: Leading economics journal covering theoretical and empirical research in economics, including financial economics and economic policy.

title: Financial Management
author: Financial Management Association International
description: Academic journal focusing on financial management, corporate finance, investments, and financial planning for both practitioners and academics.

title: Journal of Corporate Finance
author: Elsevier
description: Academic journal devoted to the study of corporate finance, covering capital structure, corporate governance, mergers and acquisitions, and financial policy.

title: Journal of Banking & Finance
author: Elsevier
description: International journal covering theoretical and empirical research in banking, finance, and related areas including financial markets and institutions.
